title: Scheduler Affinity
audience: Concurrency Working Group (SG1), Library Evolution Working Group (LEWG), Library Working Group (LWG)

applicable_answered.question: Q1
applicable_answered.question_text: Does the paper show code of the feature it is proposing?

references.quote:
Thus, instead of using

```
affine_on(sndr, sch)
```

the algorithm is used just with the sender:

```
affine_on(sndr)
```
